questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What will be the seventh step of the rearrangement process?
1) Anis dinner bar everyday Anis after goes the
2) Anis dinner everyday bar after goes the
3) everyday bar dinner Anis goes the after to
4) goes Anis the the bar dinner everyday after
5) None of these

choices.1: Anis dinner bar everyday Anis after goes the
choices.2: Anis dinner everyday bar after goes the
choices.3: everyday bar dinner Anis goes the after to
choices.4: goes Anis the the bar dinner everyday after

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Input: the men will arrive on Monday
Which of the following would be the fifth step for the above input?
1) arrive on the men will Monday
2) on Monday men arrive the will
3) men the will Monday arrive on
4) Monday will the on arrive men
5) None of these

choices.1: arrive on the men will Monday
choices.2: on Monday men arrive the will
choices.3: men the will Monday arrive on
choices.4: Monday will the on arrive men

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If the fourth step of an input is 'him gateway at intercept we will hit at' is the sixth step of that input?
1) we intercept the him will gateway
2) at intercept we will him the gateway
3) the intercept we will him gateway at
4) we gateway will him the at intercept
5) we the him gateway at intercept will

choices.1: we intercept the him will gateway
choices.2: at intercept we will him the gateway
choices.3: the intercept we will him gateway at
choices.4: we gateway will him the at intercept
choices.5: we the him gateway at intercept will

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If the third step of an input is 'money be after the will paid sunset as' what is the middle word of the sixth step?
1) the
2) paid
3) will
4) be
5) money

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Input: 'during put we who me the' What would be the next and the last words of step V of this input?
1) lights, put
2) during, off
3) murder, let
4) during, put
5) None of these
